zh.Edmonton, Middlesex, England: 英國英格蘭米德萊可艾德蒙頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes Champneis於1338年出生在英國米德萊可倫敦時，她的父親Sir William Champneis24歲，母親Agnes Wykeham15歲。她與Sir Adam Francis Lord Mayor of London結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1424年8月5日在她的家鄉享年86歲。

zh-hans.Edmonton, Middlesex, England: 英国英格兰米德萊可艾德蒙頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes Champneis于1338年出生在英国米德萊可倫敦时，她的父亲Sir William Champneis24岁，母亲Agnes Wykeham15岁。她与Sir Adam Francis Lord Mayor of London结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1424年8月5日在她的家乡享年86岁。

nameMeanings.name: Champneis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Champness
meanings: Norman, English: locative name denoting someone from Champagne, from Anglo-Norman French le champeneis, Middle English champenais, champeney. The name was originally freely interchangeable with the synonymous Champain and Champion .

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes Champneis was born in 1338, in London, Middlesex, England, her father, Sir William Champneis, was 24 and her mother, Agnes Wykeham, was 15. She married Sir Adam Francis Lord Mayor of London. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 5 August 1424, in her hometown, at the age of 86.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes Champneis est née en 1338, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Champneis, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Agnes Wykeham, avait 15 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Adam Francis Lord Mayor of London. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 5 août 1424, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 86 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes Champneis 1338 in London, Middlesex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William Champneis 24 und ihre Mutter Agnes Wykeham 15. Sie hat Sir Adam Francis Lord Mayor of London geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 5. August 1424 im Alter von 86 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Champneis è nata il nel 1338 nel London, Middlesex, England, sua padre, Sir William Champneis, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Agnes Wykeham, aveva 15 anni. Lei sposato Sir Adam Francis Lord Mayor of London. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 5 agosto 1424, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 86 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes Champneisが1338年にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドンで生まれた時，父Sir William Champneisは24歳，母Agnes Wykehamは15歳であった。Sir Adam Francis Lord Mayor of Londonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1424年8月5日に故郷で86歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Champneis(이)가 1338년 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William Champneis(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes Wykeham(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 Sir Adam Francis Lord Mayor of London(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1424년 8월 5일 그녀의 고향에서 86세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Champneis nasceu em 1338, em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William Champneis, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Wykeham, tinha 15 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Adam Francis Lord Mayor of London. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 5 de agosto de 1424, em sua cidade natal, com 86 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes Champneis родилась в 1338 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir William Champneis было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes Wykeham, 15. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Adam Francis Lord Mayor of London. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 5 августа 1424 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 86 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnes Champneis nació en 1338, en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir William Champneis, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Agnes Wykeham, tenía 15 años. Se casó con Sir Adam Francis Lord Mayor of London. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 5 de agosto de 1424, en su pueblo, a la edad de 86 años.
